summary: Implemented ephemeral session seed module using FNV-1a hash. sessionSeed.ts exposes SeedInputs interface, hashInputs() pure function, initSessionSeed() singleton initializer, and getSessionSeed() accessor. The seed combines BrowserSignals, GeoHint, and Date.now() into a deterministic base-36 hash string. No source data is retained after hashing. Wired into main.ts after geo hint resolves. All 13 tests pass, build succeeds.
